description: Payment of fees as specified in applicable SOW/Order Form
penalty_if_missed: Late interest charges on overdue amounts

description: Late payment interest on overdue invoice amounts
penalty_if_missed: Interest accrues on all unpaid balances

description: Disputed invoice must be notified in writing promptly upon receipt
penalty_if_missed: Waiver of dispute rights if not raised timely

description: Client responsible for all applicable taxes on services
penalty_if_missed: Liability for unpaid taxes and penalties

description: Service levels defined per individual Statement of Work must be met
penalty_if_missed: Service credits or mandatory remediation

description: Services must be performed in a professional and workmanlike manner
penalty_if_missed: Breach of contract / obligation to remediate

description: Services must conform to all specifications in applicable SOW
penalty_if_missed: Obligation to re-perform or issue refund

description: Deliverables subject to Client acceptance review period per SOW
penalty_if_missed: Deliverable deemed accepted if no timely objection raised

description: Commercial General Liability insurance must be maintained continuously
penalty_if_missed: Material breach / potential contract termination

description: Workers' Compensation insurance required as mandated by applicable law
penalty_if_missed: Breach of agreement and regulatory penalties

description: Professional Liability / Errors & Omissions insurance must be maintained
penalty_if_missed: Material breach of agreement

description: Certificate of Insurance must be provided to Client upon request
penalty_if_missed: Breach of agreement

description: Both parties must comply with all applicable laws and regulations
penalty_if_missed: Breach of contract / indemnification liability

description: Compliance with applicable data protection laws including GDPR and CCPA
penalty_if_missed: Regulatory fines up to 4% of global revenue / indemnification

description: Appropriate data security measures must be implemented and maintained
penalty_if_missed: Breach of contract / full liability for data loss or exposure

description: Compliance with export control and trade sanction laws
penalty_if_missed: Legal and regulatory penalties including criminal liability

description: Compliance with anti-bribery and anti-corruption laws (FCPA, UK Bribery Act)
penalty_if_missed: Immediate termination and full legal liability

description: All formal notices must be in writing via mail or email per agreement terms
penalty_if_missed: Notice deemed legally ineffective

description: Written notice required for termination for convenience — typically 30–90 days prior
penalty_if_missed: Termination deemed legally ineffective

description: Written notice of material breach required with 30-day cure period before termination
penalty_if_missed: Loss of right to terminate for cause

description: Security breach notification to Client required within 72 hours of discovery
penalty_if_missed: Regulatory fines / full indemnification liability

description: Notice required upon change of control event affecting either party
penalty_if_missed: Counterparty termination right triggered without notice

description: Status reports on service delivery and project progress per SOW schedule
penalty_if_missed: Breach of SOW obligations

description: SLA performance reports delivered monthly or as specified in SOW
penalty_if_missed: Service credit exposure and audit risk

description: Security and service incidents must be reported to Client promptly upon discovery
penalty_if_missed: Increased liability for delayed notification

description: Provider must maintain records and support Client audit rights upon reasonable request
penalty_if_missed: Material breach of agreement

description: Non-disclosure of Confidential Information during term and 3–5 years post-termination
penalty_if_missed: Injunctive relief and damages

description: Confidential Information may only be used for purposes of this agreement
penalty_if_missed: Breach of contract and damages

description: Return or destruction of Confidential Information required upon termination or request
penalty_if_missed: Breach of agreement / continued liability

description: Provider indemnifies Client for all third-party IP infringement claims
penalty_if_missed: Full exposure to third-party damages and legal costs

description: Provider indemnifies Client for gross negligence and willful misconduct
penalty_if_missed: Uncapped exposure to damages

description: Indemnified party must promptly notify indemnifying party upon notice of any claim
penalty_if_missed: Loss of indemnification right

description: Provider must maintain qualified personnel to deliver contracted services
penalty_if_missed: Breach of agreement / service degradation liability

description: Key personnel changes require prior Client notification and approval
penalty_if_missed: Breach of agreement

description: Business continuity and disaster recovery plans must be maintained
penalty_if_missed: Service disruption liability

description: Agreement auto-renews unless written notice of non-renewal provided per agreement terms
penalty_if_missed: Unintended auto-renewal binding both parties

description: No assignment of agreement without prior written consent of the other party
penalty_if_missed: Assignment void / material breach of agreement

description: All amendments to the agreement must be in writing and signed by both parties
penalty_if_missed: Oral or informal modifications deemed unenforceable
